calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"implied juror bias\" \"similar crime\"",filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","status","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }
